name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently — no pressure at all, life gets busy and we get it. We just wanted you to know the chair's still here whenever you'd like to come back for a painless cleaning or a quick check-in.

If it helps, here's a personal 20% off code on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days and works on any visit — cleanings, consultations, you name it.

And if something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely like to hear it. Just hit reply — a real person reads every email.

Take care of those teeth either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hey {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a friendly heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is good for a few more days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
